2605.25536.title: A Tertiary Review of Large Language Model-Based Code Generating Tasks: Trends, Challenges, and Future Directions
2605.25536.paper_summary: Context. Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to code-generating tasks (CGTs) in software engineering. While reported results are promising, the broader effects of such application and their integration into real-world development remain insufficiently understood with existing tertiary studies provide little in this area. Objective. This tertiary study consolidates secondary evidence on LLM-based CGTs, synthesizing the publication landscape, effects, scenarios, integration challenges, and future research directions. Method. Following systematic review guidelines, we searched in related digital libraries, complemented by backward-and-forward snowballing and screening step. Study quality was assessed and extraction reliability was audited with inter-rater agreement statistics. Evidence was synthesized using SWEBOK knowledge areas and the HELM framework. Results. We identify 30 secondary studies published between 2017-2025, with rapid growth since 2023. Accuracy seems strong on benchmarks but weakly supported for real-world generalization; robustness is fragile across tasks and configurations; efficiency constraints are pervasive; toxicity and bias are under-reported. Dominant challenges concern economic feasibility, evaluation validity, and socio-technical integration. Future directions suggest domain-aware model improvement and the need for holistic, standardized evaluation. Conclusion. LLM-based CGTs represent a fast-maturing yet unevenly evaluated research area, highlighting the need for domain-aware model improvements and holistic, standardized evaluation, addressing efficiency and associated costs.
2605.25536.paper_summary_zh: 上下文。大型語言模型（LLMs）在軟體工程中的程式碼生成任務（CGTs）中越來越多地被應用。雖然報導的結果令人鼓舞，但這種應用的更廣泛影響及其在實際開發中的整合仍然不夠清楚，現有的第三類研究在這方面提供的資訊有限。目標。本研究整合了有關基於LLM的CGTs的二級證據，綜合了出版現狀、影響、場景、整合挑戰及未來研究方向。方法。根據系統評價指導方針，我們在相關的數位圖書館中進行了搜索，並輔以向後和向前的滾雪球法及篩選步驟。研究質量進行了評估，並使用評審者間一致性統計來審核提取的可靠性。證據使用SWEBOK知識領域和HELM框架進行綜合。結果。我們確定了2017年至2025年間發表的30篇二級研究，自2023年以來快速增長。準確性在基準測試中似乎較強，但在實際世界的泛化支持上較弱；在任務和配置之間的穩健性脆弱；效率限制普遍存在；毒性和偏見的報導不足。主要挑戰涉及經濟可行性、評估有效性和社會技術整合。未來方向建議進行領域知識導向的模型改進，以及對整體、標準化評估的需求。結論。基於LLM的CGTs代表了一個快速成熟但評估不均的研究領域，突顯了對領域知識導向模型改進和整體、標準化評估的需求，並解決效率及相關成本問題。
2605.25536.author: Muslim Chochlov et.al.
2605.25536.authors: Muslim Chochlov, Michael English, Jim Buckley
